subcodes.first_line: O descendant of that servant at the Divine Threshold! The letter was read, wherein a question was raised concerning the authority of the verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلف آن خادم درگاه الهی ورقه محرره قرائت گردید سوال از حجیت ایات شده بود
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
